title: Minecraft with the boys.
description: New armour weapons tools, blocks, generation and even bosses and overhauls to dimensions!
body:
New world generation with reterraforged that makes realistic terrain, decorations for your towns,houses and bases to enchance your build's! New armour tools and wepons to make defeating bosses player's and mobs easier and also adding better combat to increase diffucluty. As well as much more in the modpack!

(note discord is for if you wanna join our server ran on the essential mod, its on around 3-6PM AEST unless you can usually fit around AEST timezone then i suggest dont play)
